title: Roblox OOF Death
description: When you die it will play the Roblox OOF Sound effect.
body:
# **Roblox Oof Death Sound Mod**

**
Overview**

Bring a touch of nostalgia and humor to your Minecraft experience with the Roblox Oof Death Sound Mod! This mod replaces the default player death sound with the iconic "Oof" sound from Roblox, giving your adventures a fun twist. Whether you're exploring, battling mobs, or just having fun with friends, the "Oof" sound is sure to bring a smile to your face every time you meet an untimely demise.
